text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash has won many G1 races, and the
autumn Tenno Sho is particularly fresh in her
memory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When I tell her how radiant she looked that day,
kneeling on the track after winning before her
parents, she smiles bashfully.
